report.summary: UX audit of 5 newly published pages (Day 42 batch). Fixed missing metadata, StructuredData, BackToTop, FAQ sections, and navigation on Compound, Curve, and AI DePIN guides. Created 3 new OG images for pages missing them.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: AI DePIN guide: Added full Table of Contents with 8 section anchors and scroll-mt-8 for smooth navigation on a 17-min read article
AI DePIN guide: Added StructuredData with article + FAQ schema for rich snippet eligibility
AI DePIN guide: Replaced <a> tags with Next.js <Link> components in breadcrumb for client-side navigation
AI DePIN guide: Added BackToTop component for long-scroll UX
AI DePIN guide: Enhanced metadata with keywords, openGraph, and twitter card fields (was minimal)
Compound ecosystem page: Created layout.tsx with full SEO metadata (was missing — use client page cannot export metadata)
Compound ecosystem page: Added FAQ section with 4 collapsible Q&As using details elements
Compound ecosystem page: Added Related Ecosystem Guides section with 3 cross-links (Curve, DeFi Lending, DCA Calculator)
Compound ecosystem page: Added BackToTop component
Curve ecosystem page: Created layout.tsx with full SEO metadata (same use client metadata issue)
Curve ecosystem page: Added FAQ section with 4 collapsible Q&As (veCRV, Curve Wars, crvUSD, StableSwap)
Curve ecosystem page: Added Related Ecosystem Guides section with 3 cross-links (Compound, Yield Farming, DCA Calculator)
Curve ecosystem page: Added BackToTop component

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: compound-guide (1200x630) — green Compound brand theme with bank icon, 4 stat cards (TVL $2.1B, Markets, $COMP, Comet V3), supply APY bar chart visualization
OG image: curve-guide (1200x630) — pink Curve brand theme with swirl icon, 4 stat cards (TVL $1.8B, $200M+ volume, $CRV, 500+ pools), StableSwap vs constant-product curve diagram
OG image: ai-depin-crypto-guide (1200x630) — green/cyan AI theme, 4 stat cards (50-80% savings, $200B+ market, 50%+ CAGR, 4+ projects), distributed GPU network node visualization

sections.title: UX Audit Findings (Backlog for Future Cycles)
items: Chain abstraction guide and prediction markets guide already had good UX patterns (StructuredData, BackToTop, OG images) — no changes needed
Compound and Curve stat cards use hardcoded values — consider adding live data fetching with isLive indicators in future cycle
52 learn pages still missing custom OG images (down from 55 after this cycle)
Ecosystem pages would benefit from a standardized template matching the learn guide pattern (ToC, structured data, FAQ)
Consider adding Data updated freshness indicators to ecosystem protocol stat cards
